prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-12ISSRMASM-12I-MTLC Product Type: RULER Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 12 inch Stainless Steel Ruler Metric and SAE Measurements Description: Every artist, craftsman, student and hobbyist needs a ruler. This stainless steel 12"/30cm precision ruler provides accuracy you can count on.

You don't have to worry about the edges deforming the way cheap plastic and wood rulers do. This is essential for art, drafting, and other precise detail work.

It won't rust, break, melt or burn, making it ideal for carpentry, metalwork, and woodworking projects. The old saying "Buy well, buy once" fits this high quality ruler perfectly. Search Terms: school engineering drafting measuring craftsman Features: - Stainless Steel - Won't Rust, Melt, Burn, Snap or Deform - Dual Sided 12"/30cm - First 3" and 10cm feature micro-increments for precision === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 12in Stainless Steel Ruler Metric SAE

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 12 in Stainless Steel Ruler

anthropic.title_differentiation: Dual Sided 12In And 30Cm, Micro-Increments, Won't Rust Melt Burn Or Deform

openai.title_differentiation: Dual Sided 12" And 30Cm, First 3" And 10Cm Micro-Increments, Rust Proof, Won't Bend, Precision Measuring
